Templates Summary

Extractive TextRank summary over drain3 templates observed in the lookback window

v2/textrank.templates
Summarising…
How it works: Every drain3 template observed in the lookback window is converted into a flat json_fingerprint string. A weighted PageRank graph is built over cosine-similarity between fingerprints, and the highest-ranked ones are joined into a single summary that captures what the templates in this window are about. Use a tighter Max sentences cap to produce a one-line headline, or leave it on auto for a richer paragraph.
Loading summary…
